title: sedum nevii var. beyrichianum
intro: Sedum nevii var. beyrichianum, also known as the Mexican stonecrop, is a succulent plant species belonging to the Crassulaceae family. Traditionally used in folk medicine, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sedum nevii var. beyrichianum include wound healing, skin issues such as eczema and acne, and respiratory problems like bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
